---
title: "Formatage_Donnees_Brutes"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Importation des librairies utiles :

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```

## Importation des données brutes :
```{r}



```
